prompt:
Educational medical diagram of the EEG double banana (longitudinal bipolar) montage.

Show a top-down view of a human head outline (oval) with the 10-20 system electrode positions marked as labeled dots:
- Fp1, Fp2 (frontopolar)
- F3, F4, F7, F8, Fz (frontal)
- C3, C4, Cz (central)
- P3, P4 (parietal)
- T3, T4, T5, T6 (temporal)
- O1, O2 (occipital)

Draw four color-coded chains of bipolar derivations with arrows connecting electrode pairs:
1. LEFT PARASAGITTAL (blue): Fp1 -> F3 -> C3 -> P3 -> O1
2. RIGHT PARASAGITTAL (blue): Fp2 -> F4 -> C4 -> P4 -> O2
3. LEFT TEMPORAL (green): Fp1 -> F7 -> T3 -> T5 -> O1
4. RIGHT TEMPORAL (green): Fp2 -> F8 -> T4 -> T6 -> O2

Along each arrow, label the channel derivation name (e.g., "Fp1-F3", "F3-C3", etc.).

Include a legend showing the four chains.
Title: "Double Banana (Longitudinal Bipolar) Montage"

Clean line art style, white background, clearly labeled. Medical textbook quality illustration suitable for first-year medical students. No photographs, no 3D effects.

Publication quality. Medical/scientific illustration style.

BACKGROUND: Pure white (#FFFFFF)
FONT: Sans-serif (Arial or Helvetica), black (#000000)
LABELS: Clear, readable, appropriately sized (10-14pt equivalent)
LINES: Consistent weight (1-2pt), black or dark gray
COLORS: Grayscale for anatomy + single accent color palette
SCALE: Include scale bar where anatomically relevant
ASPECT: 4:3

EXCLUDE: Watermarks, signatures, artistic lighting, gradients,
    shadows, 3D rendering effects, stock photo aesthetics,
    decorative borders, clip art style, cartoon style
negative_prompt: Do not include: watermark, signature, artist name, copyright text, decorative border, ornamental frame, clip art, cartoon style, 3D render, photorealistic lighting, lens flare, bokeh, depth of field blur, vignette, film grain, noise texture, drop shadow on text, gradient backgrounds, stock photo, human hands, human faces, realistic skin texture
